projects.name: GT Precision Website
bullets: Website/SEO review done (6/23): owns #1-2 for 'precision sheet metal Tampa' + named first in AI answers. Live GSC: 231 clicks / 25.8K impressions / 0.9% CTR (3 mo). GBP: 4.7star/12 reviews (flat 30 days), 702 interactions, 863 monthly views, photos 68 days stale. Built maintenance runbook + monthly auto-review (1st of month, first run Jul 1).

Open for GH (Action_Pack_2026-06-23): upload 4 staged fresh GBP photos (clears stale flag); ASK 2-3 customers for Google reviews (top lever for the 'near me' gap - stuck at 12); claim Apple Business Connect (new AI/Siri lever) + Bing Places.
FabBridge: complete end-to-end quote engine built (flat_pattern_calculator_v2.html). Remaining = production wiring (live xlsx, Fusion/STEP auto-read, finish-dropdown trim).
